title: Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings

seo.title: How to Make Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings — Easy American Recipe
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make authentic Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings. This easy American recipe includes step-by-step instructions, tips, and serving ideas.

seo.h1: Authentic Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings Recipe

seo.imageAlt: Authentic American Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings recipe
seo.imageCaption: Delicious homemade Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings — a beloved American classic

description: Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings are a quintessential American appetizer, famous for their irresistible crunch and tangy, spicy kick. These wings are typically deep-fried or baked to perfection, then generously tossed in a vibrant hot sauce mixture made with butter and cayenne pepper. Served with cool blue cheese dressing and crisp celery sticks, they are the ultimate game-day snack or party starter.

ingredients.item: Frank's RedHot Original Cayenne Pepper Sauce

instructions.title: Prepare the Wings
instructions.text: Pat chicken wings very dry with paper towels. In a large bowl, toss wings with baking powder, salt, and black pepper until evenly coated. The baking powder helps achieve extra crispiness.

instructions.title: Arrange and Chill
instructions.text: Arrange the seasoned wings in a single layer on a wire rack set over a baking sheet. Place the baking sheet in the refrigerator and chill for at least 1 hour, or preferably overnight. This further dries the skin, contributing to crispiness.

instructions.title: Preheat and Cook Wings
instructions.text: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C) for baking, or heat oil in a deep fryer to 375°F (190°C). If baking, bake for 45-55 minutes, flipping halfway through, until golden brown and crispy. If frying, fry in batches for 8-10 minutes until golden brown and cooked through.

instructions.title: Make the Buffalo Sauce
instructions.text: While wings cook, melt unsalted butter in a small saucepan over medium-low heat. Remove from heat and whisk in Frank's RedHot Original Cayenne Pepper Sauce, white vinegar, garlic powder, and Worcestershire sauce (if using). Keep warm.

instructions.title: Toss the Wings
instructions.text: Once the wings are cooked and crispy, transfer them immediately to a large bowl. Pour the warm Buffalo sauce over the wings and toss thoroughly until every wing is evenly coated.

instructions.title: Serve Immediately
instructions.text: Arrange the sauced Buffalo wings on a platter. Serve hot with a generous side of creamy blue cheese dressing and crisp celery sticks for dipping.

tips: For maximum crispiness, ensure your wings are as dry as possible before seasoning and cooking. Chilling them uncovered in the fridge overnight works wonders.
Use Frank's RedHot Original Cayenne Pepper Sauce for an authentic Buffalo flavor; it's the classic base for the sauce. Don't skimp on the butter!
Serve your crispy wings immediately after tossing in the sauce to maintain their heat and crunch. Always offer cool blue cheese dressing and fresh celery sticks to balance the spice.
article: Crispy Buffalo Chicken Wings is a beloved American Appetizers dish enjoyed across American. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
